title: ceratophyllum demersum var. muricatum
intro: Ceratophyllum demersum var. muricatum, also known as hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Ceratophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of hornwort include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Hornwort can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
